title: Human Approval, Trustworthy Preview, Pause, Expiry, and Resume · Behavior Case: Approval Request Binding
summary: The model asks “Are you sure?”, hides exact recipients and amount, edits arguments after approval, treats silence as consent, and cannot safely resume after process restart. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the approval request binding increment in cryptographically bound approval checkpoint. Learners progress through prediction, exp…
objectives: Bind approval to user, session, policy, tool version, normalized arguments digest, preview digest, expiry, and one execution nonce.
Render application-owned exact tool, arguments, target, before and after state, consequences, reversibility, cost, and alternatives accessibly.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-human-approval-resume-5
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-human-approval-resume-5.
# Case 9036: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def worked_agentpy_human_approval_resume_5(sensitive_actions: int = 8, approval_requests: int = 8, immutable_previews: int = 8, approved_actions: int = 5, expired_or_rejected: int = 3) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "authorityworked5",
        "interaction9036",
        "tool5dekrow",
        "stateworked59036",
        "evaluation9036worked5",
        "recovery5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if sensitive_actions < 1 or approval_requests < 0:
        return False, approval_requests, "approval-count"
    if approval_requests != sensitive_actions or immutable_previews != sensitive_actions:
        return False, immutable_previews, "approval-preview-gap"
    if approved_actions + expired_or_rejected != sensitive_actions:
        return False, approved_actions, "approval-reconciliation"
    if expired_or_rejected < 1:
        return False, expired_or_rejected, "approval-expiry"
    assert approval_requests == sensitive_actions and approved_actions + expired_or_rejected == sensitive_actions
    return True, approved_actions, "bound-human-approval"
